reviews.comment:
El tipo que atiende el lavadero es un estafador. Les mostré un cupón de lavado gratis que me dieron cuando me asocié ANTES de dejar el auto a lavar y me dijeron que tenía que presentarlo cuando lo retirara. Después, cuando lo retiré, me atendió otra persona y me dijo que no me aceptaban el cupón porque decía ACA Palermo. Cosa que no me aclararon antes. Puras excusas y me cobraron igual. Unos estafadores.

(Translated by Google)
The guy who runs the car wash is a scammer. I showed them a free car wash coupon I got when I joined BEFORE I even dropped off my car, and they told me I had to show it when I picked it up. Then, when I went to pick it up, someone else helped me and said they wouldn't accept the coupon because it said ACA Palermo. They hadn't told me that beforehand. Just excuses, and they charged me anyway. They're scammers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSUVRGQlJZWFl3YUV4VFpXTnJWRTVDUkRscmVGRRAB
